name: Pan-Wilted Winter Greens with Fresh Ginger (Hh)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 teaspoon Salt, prefer fine sea salt
1 pound Kale, stems removed, leaves cut into 1 1/2-inch-wide strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large skillet, combine the ginger, salt and 1/2 cup of water.
Bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Add the spinach, kale and Swiss chard, packing them down with the
pan lid. Cover and cook over high heat, stirring occasionally,
until tender, about 5 minutes.
